name: labs_sensors
query:
select s.sensor_id, 
            a.asset_id, 
            a.name as asset_name, 
            a.room,
            s.type,
            max(last_metrics.value) as value,
            max(case when last_metrics.value >= al.critical then 2
                  when last_metrics.value >= al.warning then 1
                  else 0
                end) as alert_level,
            max(last_metrics.timestamp) as last_metric_date
    from labs_sensors s
    inner join labs_assets a on s.asset_id = a.asset_id
    LEFT JOIN  (
      select distinct on (sensor_id) *
      from labs_metrics m
      order by sensor_id, "timestamp" desc
    ) AS last_metrics ON s.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id
    LEFT JOIN labs_alerts al on al.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4,5
